description: Calculate the monthly payments, break-even timelines, and total savings for the three mortgage refinance offers.

natural_language.prompt: A homeowner with a $238,000 mortgage balance at 6.5% interest (23 years remaining, $1,806/month payment) has received three refinance offers. Calculate which offers make financial sense by determining monthly payments (using PMT function), monthly savings, break-even timelines, and 5-year/7-year total savings. Provide recommendations based on whether break-even occurs before 5 years.
